title: croton cotabatensis
intro: Croton cotabatensis, also known as the Cotabato croton, is a medicinal plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Croton cotabatensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Croton cotabatensis can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, or used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
